name: apple-health-mcp-server
description: Probably the most complete Apple Health MCP server — local-first ingest of Apple Health export.xml + ECG CSVs + GPX into DuckDB, exposed over 17 read-oriented MCP tools.
long_description: Ingests an Apple Health export (export.xml + electrocardiograms/*.csv + workout-routes/*.gpx) into a local DuckDB database and exposes 17 read-oriented MCP tools over it (records / workouts / heart rate samples / ECG readings / activity summaries / state of mind / etc., plus a validated SELECT-only escape hatch). All data stays local; nothing is uploaded.
